backend/main.mo: Defines the BlackgoldKdent canister with storage mixins and extensive type definitions for services, vessels, inquiries, gift cards, exports, emails, and analytics.
backend/users/Users.mo: Implements user management with a stateful OrderedMap, including user creation, retrieval, and ID tracking.
feature_evidence.json: Lists implemented features with associated files, components, tests, and confidence levels for project tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides short summaries of various frontend files for documentation and build planning.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point containing SEO metadata, social tags, favicon, analytics, and resource links.
frontend/public/.htaccess: Apache config enabling WebP negotiation, caching, compression, and proper MIME handling for optimized images.
frontend/public/bgkd-giftcard-system.htm: Standalone themed page describing the BGKD gift card system with hero banner, metadata, styles, and layout elements.
frontend/public/image-optimization-repor: Static HTML report page showing image optimization statistics and styled sections.
frontend/public/press-release.html: Press release HTML page with SEO metadata announcing the BGKD crypto token launch.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the React app router, themes, and page routes using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/kd/AdminAddUserC: Admin UI card allowing platform admins to add users with form validation and mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main site layout with navigation, header, and mobile menu logic.
frontend/src/components/OptimizedImage.t: React component that serves WebP images with fallbacks and special handling for certain asset types.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor with query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication and login state using Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data such as services, vessels, company info, and gift cards.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup with custom theme variables, dark mode styles, component utilities, and animated metallic gift‑card effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with company overview, values, and loading state using data from useCompanyInfo.
frontend/src/pages/CareersPage.tsx: Implements the Careers page with benefits, programs, and a career inquiry form submitted via React Query.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Implements a contact page with company info, contact cards, and a form that submits messages via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/CryptoTokensPage.tsx: Displays tokenomics data, a countdown timer, and an investor inquiry form with validation and submission logic.
frontend/src/pages/FleetPage.tsx: Shows a fleet listing with vessel filtering, loading state handling, and responsive vessel cards.
frontend/src/pages/GiftCardSystemPage.ts: Provides a full gift card management dashboard with authentication, canister info fetching, analytics, and creation/redemption actions.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the homepage featuring a hero section, dynamic company metrics, and navigation to services and fleet pages.
frontend/src/pages/KDDashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page handling authentication, admin checks, user metrics, and error states with conditional UI rendering.
frontend/src/pages/KDPlatformLandingPage: Landing page presenting KD Platform marketing content and a button that routes users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Services listing page that loads service data, displays service cards with icons, and shows a detail dialog on selection.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending themes, colors, and plugins including KD and maritime design tokens.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing architecture direction, features, issues, and current build state.
